headline: Is Monster Beverage (MNST) Still Sensibly Priced After Its Strong 1 Year Share Price Run
summary: If you are wondering whether Monster Beverage is still fairly priced after a strong run, this breakdown will help you frame what the current share price might be implying. The stock last closed at US$77.56, with returns of 2.9% over 7 days, 6.2% over 30 days, 1.8% year to date, 32.4% over 1 year, 40.3% over 3 years and 58.4% over 5 years.
